installCommand: cd app && echo '=== before npm ci ===' && (ls node_modules/next/package.json 2>/dev/null && head -3 node_modules/next/package.json || echo 'no node_modules/next yet') && rm -rf node_modules && npm ci && echo '=== after npm ci ===' && head -3 node_modules/next/package.json && npm ls next
buildCommand: cd app && echo '=== before next build ===' && head -3 node_modules/next/package.json && rm -rf .next .turbo && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.postgres.prisma && next build --webpack
